activities.title: Activities
activities.empty: No activities found for this query.

assetClassification.matchTaxonomyError: I could not match the requested taxonomy. I’ll use the available asset taxonomies instead.
assetClassification.unknownSliceError: The image includes an Unknown slice. It is not a category here, so it should be left unallocated.
assetClassification.residualBucketError: The image includes an Other or Unknown slice. It should be left unallocated unless there is an exact matching category.
assetClassification.notInTaxonomyError: One proposed category is not available in the selected taxonomy. I’ll use only matching categories.
assetClassification.duplicateCategoryError: Some rows map to the same category. I’ll combine them and retry.
assetClassification.ambiguousError: I found more than one matching asset. Choose the exact asset in the draft widget.
assetClassification.genericError: I could not prepare this draft yet. I’ll retry with the available categories.
assetClassification.singleSelectMultiple: Single-select taxonomy has more than one proposed category.
assetClassification.couldNotReadDraft: Could not read the classification draft returned by the tool.
assetClassification.noResolvedAsset: No resolved asset was returned for this classification draft.
assetClassification.chatNotUpdated: Classification changed, but this chat could not be updated.

assetTaxonomy.matchTaxonomyError: Could not match that taxonomy. I’ll use the available asset taxonomies.
assetTaxonomy.unknownError: Unknown is not a category here. I’ll leave it unallocated.
assetTaxonomy.ambiguousError: More than one asset matched. Ask again with the exchange, currency, or asset ID.
assetTaxonomy.notFoundError: Could not find that asset among active assets.
assetTaxonomy.genericError: Could not complete that lookup. I’ll continue with the available information.

createRule.chatNotUpdated: Rule created, but this chat could not be updated. Refresh rules before retrying from this draft.

dataAccess.accountsDescription: Account details, portfolios, and cash balances
dataAccess.holdingsDescription: Positions, their values, and net worth

providerSettings.noModelsSelected: No models selected. Click "Add" to add models.
providerSettings.capabilitiesPreset: Capabilities are preset for recommended models.
providerSettings.dataAccessSubtitle: What data the AI can access
providerSettings.aiDataSharingDescription: Enabled AI tools may share relevant portfolio data and attachments with your selected AI provider when used in chat.
providerSettings.structuredOptionsDescription: Arrays and objects ship with the app and can't be edited here.
providerSettings.orphanedOverrides: Orphaned overrides — the following keys are no longer in the catalog:
providerSettings.endpointDescription: Override the default endpoint for this provider.

field.temperatureDescription: Controls randomness. Lower = more deterministic output.
field.maxTokensThinkingDescription: Used when the model reasons internally — reasoning tokens count against this cap, so it should be larger than Max output tokens.

extra.num_ctx: Context window size in tokens. Input + output must fit inside.
extra.num_predict: Max tokens to generate (Ollama's equivalent of max_tokens).
extra.top_k: Only sample from the top-K most likely tokens. 0 = disabled.
extra.top_p: Nucleus sampling — consider tokens up to this cumulative probability.
extra.min_p: Minimum probability threshold for candidate tokens.
extra.mirostat: Mirostat sampling mode. 0 = off, 1 or 2 = enabled.
extra.repeat_penalty: Penalize repeated tokens. 1 = none, >1 = discourage repetition.
extra.repeat_last_n: How many recent tokens the repeat penalty considers.
extra.frequency_penalty: Penalize tokens by how often they've appeared. Range -2 to 2.
extra.presence_penalty: Encourage new topics by penalizing any repetition. Range -2 to 2.
extra.seed: Seed for reproducible output. Leave empty for random.

group.samplingBlurb: How randomly the model picks the next token.
group.limitsBlurb: Caps on response length and context size.
group.repetitionBlurb: Discourage the model from repeating itself.
